headline: Sennheiser’s new Momentum 5 headphones have upgraded ANC and a replaceable battery
summary: Sennheiser announces its Momentum 5 Wireless headphones. They feature upgraded Active Noise Cancellation. A key new feature is a replaceable battery.

headline: Ferrari reveals its first EV, with design help from Jony Ive
summary: Ferrari unveils its first electric vehicle, the Luce. It was designed in collaboration with Jony Ive and LoveFrom. The Luce will also be Ferrari's second four-door car.

headline: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
summary: Cox Media and marketing firms fined by the FTC. They falsely claimed to spy on users via phones and smart devices. The companies will pay a total settlement for the deception.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are currently underway. Find deals on popular tech like portable speakers and solar lights. It's a prime time to grab discounted gadgets.

headline: Destiny 2 Changes Reportedly Kept from Most Bungie Staff Ahead of Public Announcement
summary: Most Bungie staff were reportedly unaware of Destiny 2 support changes. The plans were kept secret until the public announcement last week. This highlights potential internal communication issues.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to a New All-Time Low Price for Memorial Day
summary: The 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 chip is on sale. It has dropped to a new all-time low price. Save $80 compared to buying directly from Apple.

headline: Tekken Director Katsuhiro Harada Finally Takes a Trip to Waffle House
summary: Tekken director Katsuhiro Harada finally visited Waffle House. This marks a long-awaited trip for the celebrated director. Fans celebrated his culinary adventure online.

headline: LittleBigPlanet Developer Media Molecule's Next Game Reportedly Features 'Open-World Content'
summary: Media Molecule is reportedly working on a new game. The upcoming title will feature open-world elements. This marks a new direction for the LittleBigPlanet developer.

headline: US military says it has launched new strikes on southern Iran
summary: The US military announced new strikes on southern Iran. Targets included Iranian missile launch sites and boats. US Central Command stated the actions were in "self-defence."

headline: Hottest May day on record in UK as temperatures pass 34C
summary: The UK recorded its hottest May day on record. Temperatures surpassed 34C across the region. This follows the warmest May night recorded on Sunday.

headline: Social media as bad for young people as smoking, top doctors say
summary: Top doctors warn social media's impact on youth is akin to smoking. The Academy of Medical Royal Colleges urges routine screen time checks. They advise monitoring social media use in younger patients.

headline: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
summary: Next boss Lord Wolfson warns of a dramatic decline. Entry-level job opportunities are shrinking significantly. The company now sees double the applicants per role.
